features.rationale: `must_be`. This IS the commodity FP ("quantify volumetric flow rate"). Every alternative provides some form of flow measurement. Primary drivers: Reliability (8) — solid-state principle delivers consistent readings per need #7 (repeatability drift <1%, Opp=11); Confidence (8) — direct measurement vs estimation-based alternatives addresses need #25 (commissioning sign-off anxiety). [SRC: 01_product_decomposition, JTBD #6 Opp=13, #7 Opp=11]

`attractive`. Current alternatives (clamp-on meters, dP manometers) do NOT include temperature measurement; separate probes are standard. Combined flow+temp in one sensor body enables thermal energy calculation (kW = flow x delta-T x Cp) without additional hardware. Primary drivers: Time (7) — eliminates separate probe installation per need #8 (zones verified per hour, Opp=11); Pain (7) — removes manual temperature recording; Confidence (7) — temperature-compensated flow readings are inherently more trustworthy. [SRC: 02_functional_promise differentiator #4, JTBD #18 Opp=14]

`one_dimensional`. Less pressure drop is proportionally better for hydronic system design — every mbar must be accounted for in pump sizing. Linear relationship. Primary drivers: Reliability (6) — no flow obstruction eliminates sensor-as-blockage-point; Cost (5) — avoids pump oversizing for head-loss compensation. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition differentiator #2]

`attractive`. HVAC contractors currently deal with impeller sensor failures and maintenance schedules. A permanently installed sensor with zero mechanical wear is genuinely delightful for a service industry accustomed to bearing replacements. Primary drivers: Reliability (9) — eliminates the dominant failure mechanism in mechanical flowmeters (bearing wear, particle jamming), directly addressing need #11 (detect post-commissioning degradation, Opp=16); Cost (7) — reduces 10-year TCO per need #21 (Opp=12). [SRC: 01_product_decomposition differentiator #1, JTBD #11 Opp=16, #14 Opp=12]

`attractive`. Current alternatives (clamp-on, dP manometer) cannot detect flow direction. Backflow detection without additional hardware provides commissioning diagnostic value. Primary drivers: Safety (6) — detects pump malfunction or check-valve failure preventing system damage; Confidence (6) — directional certainty that estimation methods cannot provide. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition differentiator #5, JTBD #10 Opp=11]

`attractive`. Bubble detection, empty-pipe detection, and glycol presence detection are diagnostics no current HVAC commissioning alternative provides. Primary drivers: Stress (7) — removes operator anxiety about hidden system problems; Reliability (7) — continuous health monitoring addresses need #11 (Opp=16) for post-commissioning degradation detection; Confidence (7) — automatic diagnostic flags vs subjective assessment. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition feature, JTBD #12 Opp=11]

`one_dimensional`. Better compensation = more accurate readings across the operating envelope. Linear relationship. Primary drivers: Reliability (7) — reduces temperature-induced error from ~1.5% to ~0.2% via NTC compensation, addressing need #13 (temperature transient robustness, Opp=9); Confidence (7) — auto-compensated readings are trustworthy across heating/cooling mode changeover. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition, JTBD #13 Opp=9]

### 09b — Validation

| # | Check | Result |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Kano cross-market consistency | PASS — must_be only for core measurement function (commodity FP baseline); 4 features classified attractive (all genuinely unexpected in HVAC commissioning); 2 one_dimensional (linear performance scaling) |
| 2 | Safety >= 7 but Confidence <= 3 | PASS — no violation. Max safety = 6 (Bidirectional), corresponding confidence = 6 |
| 3 | Skill >= 7 but Stress <= 3 | PASS — no violation. Max skill = 6 (Anomaly Detection, Temperature Sensing), corresponding stress >= 5 |
| 4 | overall_fit arithmetic | PASS — all 7 values recomputed: (sum of 9 scores) / 9, rounded to 2 decimal places |
| 5 | No feature scores 10 on all dimensions | PASS — max single score = 9 (No Moving Parts → Reliability) |
| 6 | Feature names comply with 1.pdf rules | PASS — spec-visible noun phrases, 2-6 words, no brand names, no outcome claims |
| 7 | Indifferent features score 1-3 on all dimensions | N/A — no indifferent features in this market |
